procedure_name: CT for Low Grade B - Cell NHL (Lenalidomide + Rituximab)
min_doctor_qualification: DM (Medical oncology) or equivalent (MD Medicine with experience/ Fellowship in Hematology/Medical Oncology)
clinical_indications: Doubling of lymphocyte counts in last 6 months

clinical_thresholds.note: Doubling of lymphocyte counts in last 6 months

preauth.label: Complete blood counts (to confirm diagnosis of CLL)
Flow cytometry (either in peripheral blood or bone marrow- confirming diagnosis of CLL)
Lymph node biopsy (confirming diagnosis of small lymphocytic lymphoma which is the counterpart of CLL and treated like CLL)
Clinical notes (Presence or absence of B symptoms)
Clinical notes (Comorbidities and indication for therapy)
Clinical notes (Prior treatment for CLL (name of regimen, cycles, date of last cycle, response))
USG abdomen +pelvis or CECT chest+ abdomen+ Pelvis – with evidence of bulky lymph nodes, massive splenomegaly or other organ involvement
Previous 3 CBC reports showing doubling of lymphocyte counts in last 6 months
Details of prior treatment (optional) : Date of start and the end of therapy, name of the regimen and response to therapy

claim.label: Reports of the tests (pathology, radiology, microbiology, hematology, biochemistry etc. listed under preauthorization)
Discharge summary of day care department
Response assessment (CECT Thorax, abdomen, pelvis if baseline presentation was with lymphadenopathy)
Response assessment (CBC to look for recovery of hemoglobin or platelet count in Rai stage III or IV)

Details of response assessment (Showing improvement in hemoglobin, platelet counts, complete blood counts, lymphadenopathy, splenomegaly and symptoms history and clinical examination, organomegaly documented on USG abdomen or pelvis or CECT chest, abdomen and pelvis)

ppd_preauth.q: Flow cytometry or biopsy report available?
Indication of therapy written and supported by documentation?
Lenalidomide + Rituximab regimen has been used previously (within one year or without response)?

common_queries: Flow cytometry or biopsy report missing.
Indication for therapy not documented or supporting documents are missing.
Prior use of Lenalidomide + Rituximab regimen within one year or without a documented response.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Essential Medical Personnel: Qualified Medical Oncologist/ Hematologist; Essential Medical Infrastructure: Chemotherapy unit (Day care/Injection room/Ward)
clinical_key_pointers: Lenalidomide + Rituximab can be used as first or subsequent line of therapy (more than once, same regimen can be repeated after 1 year if patient has had response to earlier course of same regimen).
